name: NextClaw App Runtime
summary: Create, preview, publish, install, and run NextClaw Apps without needing to understand napp, WASI, Wasmtime, JCO, npm, registry, or marketplace details.

summaryI18n.en: Create, preview, publish, install, and run NextClaw Apps without needing to understand napp, WASI, Wasmtime, JCO, npm, registry, or marketplace details.
summaryI18n.zh: 创建、预览、发布、安装和运行 NextClaw Apps，用户不需要理解 napp、WASI、Wasmtime、JCO、npm、registry 或 marketplace 细节。

description: Use this skill when the user wants to build, publish, install, or use a NextClaw App through @nextclaw/app-runtime. The skill owns the ordinary-user journey: readiness checks with `napp doctor`, TypeScript/Hono WASI HTTP scaffolding, automated `napp build --install`, local preview links, marketplace publish through platform login, registry install flows, explicit permission mapping, and first-run troubleshooting.

descriptionI18n.en: Use this skill when the user wants to build, publish, install, or use a NextClaw App through @nextclaw/app-runtime. The skill owns the ordinary-user journey: readiness checks with `napp doctor`, TypeScript/Hono WASI HTTP scaffolding, automated `napp build --install`, local preview links, marketplace publish through platform login, registry install flows, explicit permission mapping, and first-run troubleshooting.
descriptionI18n.zh: 当用户希望通过 @nextclaw/app-runtime 构建、发布、安装或使用 NextClaw App 时使用此技能。它负责普通用户旅程：通过 `napp doctor` 检查环境、生成 TypeScript/Hono WASI HTTP 应用、自动 `napp build --install`、返回本地预览链接、通过平台登录态发布到应用商店、从 registry 安装应用、显式权限映射和首轮排障。

author: NextClaw
